texto: I checked on the Internet this morning, and I realized that with five individual world titles, I was level with my elders Florian Rousseau and Arnaud Tournant, who were the sprint leaders in France when I started at the French Institute of Sports and taught me everything. I had the chance to overtake them, and I did it.
explicacao: Citação de Francois Pervis sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “I checked on the Internet this morning, and I realized that with five individual world titles, I …” articula lideranca, morning, world em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e world.

I had the chance to overtake them, and I did it.
